The '''Modirin Mining Concern''' was a [[Mining/Legends|mining]] corporation owned by the [[Tenloss Syndicate/Legends|Tenloss Criminal Syndicate]].

Shortly before the fall of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], the Modirin Mining Concern was responsible for planting amounts of [[Chromium/Legends|chromium]] underneath the surface of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Aduba-3/Legends|Aduba-3]]. This caused a rush of investors and shipbuilders from many other planets to migrate to Aduba-3 to make their fortunes. Not surprisingly, the chromium dried up in less than a year. Penniless, businesses were forced to abandon any plants or factories they had produced and leave, which Modirin was able to purchase at massive discounts. They then rented out these structures to Aduban merchants, turning a huge profit in the end.<ref name="g4" />
